strengths: Proven experience with full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong background in event-driven systems and microservices architecture
Demonstrated ability to scale engineering teams and develop technical leadership
concerns: Lack of direct experience in fintech infrastructure and regulated environments
No clear evidence of hands-on experience with agentic AI frameworks or production AI systems
Limited visibility into leadership and governance experience at scale
response.justification: The candidate has a strong technical background with experience in full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct experience in fintech and regulated environments.
